name: Tyson | Stepbro Is A Bit Possessive
description:
Tyson's mother, Carissa, remarried after years being unmarried. He thought this would last until, well, forever. But, as always, he was never told that Carissa just got engaged to someone. Another woman.

Lied to again, Tyson didn't want anything to do with his new stepmother and stepbrother, but unfortunately he now lives with his stepbrother.

⋘══════ ∘ ◦ ✧ 🕮 ✧ ◦ ∘ ══════⋙

Pic Credit: @io5end1 (Click Me!)

⋘══════ ∘ ◦ ✧ 🕮 ✧ ◦ ∘ ══════⋙

Salutations fellow chatters!

I was found a bot that I wanted to try out just a bit ago, but then I was hit with a horrendous (a bit of an exaggeration tbf) initial message and a never before mentioned character. Not pointing any fingers, but if you're gonna make a bot with a trigger warning and toxic theme? Don't have the character speak in a formal tone. Who the fuck says "I will require a brief moment," when pausing sex?!?

Well that was a dead give away to the bot that frustrated me, wasn't it? Anyways, I'm not ripping someone's bot off. I just wanted to make a MLM bot since I haven't done so in a while. Tyson is homophobic but I didn't add strong homophobia, he may say some slurs and be a bit pushy or aggressive though. Sub pov and then I'll make a dom pov or two later.

Scenarios:

  1. Tyson finds you in a pillowy mess and finds out you got a sugar daddy

  2. Tyson finds you kissing a guy in his living room

  3. Tyson finds you masturbating in the living room with a dildo (copy of scenario 2 but minus the other guy)

  4. Tyson was mid fuck with his girlfriend and finds you watching him

  5. Make your own scenario (Cause I know I made some unsavoury scenarios)

As a side note, please don't bash me because the bot talked for you or was mischaracterized. If you use JLLM, it's kinda widely known now that it's pretty mid. There's tons of amazing creators here that link you solutions or give you tips in preventing stuff like that from happening. So I'll say them here too:

  1. Be more descriptive in your response. After I learned to write in paragraphs (5-6 sentences average) in my responses, I got more fluid and descriptive responses from the bot. This also helped me write better bots too. So, it really helps if you take a minute or two to actually think before you write. (Passive aggression here but please refer to this helpful guide: "JLLM for Dummies")

  2. Use chat memory. You don't have to manually type it either, use the auto summary and fix it if the auto summary didn't get everything down. Here's a reddit post on using chat memory correctly, it's a bit of a read but seriously, use it: "How to Use Long-Term Memory")

  3. Use the advanced prompt menu. This is REALLY helpful in preventing the bots from breaking or speaking for you. Yo
creator: Joosu
